name: qradar-create-reference-set

outputs.description: date Creation time of the reference set QRadar.Reference.ElementType
outputs.name: QRadar.Reference.CreationTime

outputs.description: The element type for the values allowed in the reference set. The allowed values are: ALN (alphanumeric), ALNIC (alphanumeric ignore case), IP (IP address), NUM (numeric), PORT (port number) or DATE. QRadar.Reference.Name Name of the reference set
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Number of elements in the created reference set. QRadar.Reference.TimeoutType Timeout type of the reference (FIRST_SEEN, LAST_SEEN and UNKNOWN)
outputs.name: QRadar.Reference.NumberOfElements
